ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle in USD */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the vehicle is manufactured */,
  "reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability rating of the vehicle (1-5) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle in MPG */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of the vehicle */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in lbs */,
  "disp" INTEGER /* Displacement of the vehicle's engine in cc */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., Front-wheel, All-wheel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle brand */,
  "country_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, consumer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the analytics refers to */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the vehicle from reviews */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales for the vehicle */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average sale price of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of vehicle */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Small, SUV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "features" TEXT /* Key features of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record refers to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., recall, redesign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the feature refers to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., sunroof, heated seats) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
